description.value:
Trigger A creature passes through the doorway

Effect The creature is pulled apart and reassembled as they pass through multiple dimensions at once. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:30] save and disappears for a number of rounds, reappearing at the end of their turn on the final round. Each round at the beginning of their turn, creatures trapped in the doorway must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save against a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Cursed Metamorphosis] spell as their bodies are warped and rearranged. A creature can pass through each red-tinged doorway only once.

Critical Success The creature disappears for 1 round. Additionally, the creature gains 10 temporary Hit Points for 24 hours. These stack with temporary Hit Points gained from other red-tinged doorways and replenish each day at midnight as long as the creature is within 1 mile of Narona.

Success The creature disappears for 1 round.

Failure The creature disappears for 2 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature disappears for 3 rounds. If the creature critically fails its saving throw against a cursed metamorphosis spell, it's permanently transformed into an amalgamite.

details.description: A swirling portal leads to unwholesome places.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:35], @Check[occultism|dc:35], or @Check[thievery|dc:35] (master); must have studied Carlina's notes
